scripts.dev:backend: node -e "try{require('child_process').execSync('python -c \"import playwright\"',{stdio:'pipe'})}catch(e){console.error('ERROR: playwright not installed. Run: npm run setup');process.exit(1)}" && python -m uvicorn api.server:app --reload --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.dev: concurrently -n fe,be -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint:py && npm run lint:ts
scripts.test: npm run test:py && npm run test:ts
scripts.setup: python -m venv venv && pip install -r requirements.txt && playwright install chromium && cd frontend && npm install
